title: Id-Based Copy
description:
Copies the source text of the second input into the target of the first input based on matching id.
Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

markAsTranslateNo.title: Set the text unit as non-translatable
markAsTranslateNo.description: When enabled, matched text units in the destination file are marked as non-translatable after the reference text is copied.

markAsApproved.title: Set the target property 'approved' to 'yes'
markAsApproved.description: When enabled, the 'approved' property of matched target entries is set to 'yes' after copying.
